creator: ktrace@yandex.ru
text:
I test nginx-naxsi from ports - all OK. Binary package installed from pkg has error.

ldd to correct version (from ports):
/usr/local/sbin/nginx:
        ...
        libpcre.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre.so.1 (0x...)
        ...


ldd to incorrect version (from binary package)

/usr/local/sbin/nginx:
        ...
        libpcre2-8.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre2-8.so.0 (0x335b17c88000)
        ...
